responseSpeed.headline: Response speed improved 12% vs last 7 days
responseSpeed.detail: Your median first touch time improved from 26s to 23s.

whatsappShare.headline: WhatsApp delivers 94% of first touches
whatsappShare.detail: Strong performance across all WhatsApp channels.

webFormSlower.headline: Web forms average 38s slower than other sources
webFormSlower.detail: Consider optimizing the web form flow or routing.

emailFallbacks.headline: 7 email fallbacks today
emailFallbacks.detail: Same as yesterday. Ensure email deliverability is healthy.

message.title: Instant first message
message.body: The moment a lead lands, the AI sends this. Keep it warm, human and specific. Use variables to personalize, and it adapts the rest of the reply to whatever the lead says next.
message.default: Hi {{lead_name}}! Thanks for reaching out to {{business_name}} 👋 I'm {{agent_name}}, here to help you straight away. To point you in the right direction, what are you looking to get sorted?

sla.title: Speed SLA
sla.help: If WhatsApp isn't delivered within the fallback window, the next enabled channel fires automatically.

channels.title: Channel order
channels.help: WhatsApp leads every conversation. SMS and email are tried in order only when the one above can't be delivered.

coverage.title: When it runs
coverage.alwaysOnHelp: Every lead gets an instant reply day or night, including weekends and holidays.
coverage.businessHoursHelp: Outside business hours, leads get a holding message and a human follows up next working day.
